name: Dua Lipa
bio: Dua Lipa's catalog keeps earning because disco-informed modern pop songs remain strong on global playlists and cross-platform short-form discovery.
notable_for: Modern pop catalog with strong replay value and global playlist reach.
career_highlight: Future Nostalgia quickly became a durable streaming-era pop catalog rather than a short-cycle release.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from current pop streaming scale, playlist velocity, dance-pop replay value, and songwriter/performer participation.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label distributed masters with artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across Lipa, producers, writers, and publishers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No broad catalog sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Newer streaming-era catalog pages can shift quickly as current-release velocity decays into catalog behavior.
